precondition: Project loaded; no filters active. System Tools accordion open.
action: Fill in the bundle name field (letters only). Keep 'Web / Presentation' preset. Click '📦 Export Bundle'.
expected_result: A .zip file is downloaded. Filename contains the entered name and a timestamp.

precondition: Download a bundle as in E01-001
expected_result: Contains: plots/ folder with one image per plot; data/ folder with at least one TSV; recipes/ folder with YAML manifest(s); README.txt. If any filters were active: FILTERS.txt is present.

scenario: Bundle with active filter includes FILTERS.txt
precondition: At least one applied filter active; System Tools open
expected_result: Zip contains FILTERS.txt listing the applied filters with column, op, and value. Header line reads 'FILTER TRACE — embedded per No Trace No Export protocol.'

action: Type a name with spaces and special characters (e.g. 'my bundle!! 2026'). Download bundle.
expected_result: Filename uses sanitised version — spaces and special chars replaced with '_'. No crash.
Plots in zip are PNG at ≤300 DPI (or SVG). Not unnecessarily large files.
Plots in zip are PNG at ≥600 DPI.

scenario: Bundle does NOT include unrelated manifests
precondition: Multiple projects available; one project selected in the navigator
expected_result: Zip contains only data and recipes for the ACTIVE project — not all projects. [NOTE: Eve observed this bug in UI_user_test.md — 'Zip export exports other manifests'. Confirm fixed or still present.]

precondition: T3 mode; at least one committed audit node present (with reason filled)
action: Click 'Export Audit Report' → choose HTML → confirm
expected_result: HTML file downloads. Opening it shows: project name, manifest SHA256 hash, auto-generated Methods section (plain English), embedded plot images, raw T3 recipe YAML.

action: Open the HTML report and read the Methods section
expected_result: Methods section is in plain English — not raw YAML or code. Each node is described (e.g. 'Rows were filtered to include only samples where country equals France.'). [NOTE: Eve found the HTML report 'horrible' in UI_user_test.md — check this carefully.]

precondition: At least one audit node targets a primary-key column; HTML report downloaded
action: Open report and find the Methods section
expected_result: The PK-affected line begins with '⚠️ [Primary key affected]'.

scenario: Export PDF/DOCX available when Pandoc present
precondition: Pandoc installed on the machine; System Tools open
expected_result: Button IS visible and clickable. [If Pandoc not installed: button is greyed out with a tooltip explaining why — not a broken button.]

precondition: At least one saved session exists in the user sessions folder
action: Open System Tools and look at Session Management panel
expected_result: A list of saved sessions is shown — each with manifest_id and timestamp. If no sessions: message 'No saved sessions.' is shown.

scenario: Import session from zip restores state
precondition: A previously exported session zip file available; fresh app start
action: Click 'Import .zip session'; select the zip file; confirm restore
expected_result: Audit nodes from the session appear in right sidebar per-plot. Notification confirms restore.

precondition: At least one committed T3 session active
action: Find and click 'Export Session (.zip)' in Session Management.
expected_result: Zip file downloads. [NOTE: this feature is currently MISSING — only import exists. Mark SKIP-DEFERRED until implemented.]

precondition: App started with SPARMVET_PERSONA=pipeline-static; System Tools open
expected_result: Session Management section is NOT visible.

precondition: App started with SPARMVET_PERSONA=pipeline-exploration-simple; System Tools open
expected_result: Section IS visible. [NOTE: currently a known bug — hardcoded check hides it. Mark FAIL until PERSONA-1 fix lands.]
